91000.name: First Step into Immortality
91000.description: Successfully guided qi into the body, stepping into the Qi Refining stage, from then on immortals and mortals are separated.

91001.name: Foundation Established
91001.description: Hundred days of foundation building, the Dao foundation is stable, lifespan greatly increased.

91002.name: Golden Core Great Achievement
91002.description: Dragon and tiger converge, the Golden Core forms itself, myriad phenomena manifest around.

91003.name: Nascent Soul Emerges
91003.description: Shatter the Golden Core to form the Nascent Soul, the Nascent Soul leaves the body, spirit roams the void.

91004.name: Ascension to Immortality
91004.description: See through life and death, complete the Spirit Transformation stage, rise with clouds, shaking the three realms.

91005.name: True Gold in Tribulation Fire
91005.description: Heavenly thunder tempers the body, tribulation fire refines the soul, the Dao heart is reborn amidst destruction.

91006.name: Heart Demons Vanquished
91006.description: Once the mind is clear, myriad demons are extinguished, the Dao heart is transparent, seeing the true self.

91007.name: Longevity of a Hundred Years
91007.description: The mortal body has already experienced a hundred springs and autumns, the mortal world has seen many changes.

91008.name: Richer than a Sect
91008.description: Spirit stones piled like mountains, countless magical artifacts, even the sect must defer to you.

91009.name: Celestial Beauty that Topples Cities
91009.description: Skin like jade, face like ice, a glance and a smile bring a hundred charms, leaving all palace beauties colorless.

91010.name: Golden Core Transforms Bones
91010.description: One golden core pill enters the abdomen, reborn with new bones and sinews, enjoying five hundred years of life.

91011.name: Primordial Spirit Travels the Abyss
91011.description: Nascent Soul leaves the body, spirit roams the void, all heaven and earth are accessible.

91012.name: Carefree and Unrestrained
91012.description: After Spirit Transformation, all laws follow the heart, smiling at the multitudes striving for crossing.

91013.name: Youthful Face Unchanged
91013.description: With magic to preserve youth, a hundred-year-old strange still looks like a young man.

91014.name: Chosen by Heaven
91014.description: Bone structure extraordinary, luck bestowed, stirring wind and clouds from birth.

91015.name: Spirit Stones Form a Mountain
91015.description: Wealth abundant, spirit stones pile like a mountain, elixirs and artifacts beyond count.

91016.name: Physical Body Achieves Sainthood
91016.description: Specializing in body cultivation, blood and qi like a dragon, resisting heavenly might without magic artifacts.

91017.name: Enlightened to True Self
91017.description: Instantaneous enlightenment, the Dao heart is transparent, all worldly methods are but illusions.

91018.name: Perished in Tribulations
91018.description: Endured five calamities without falling, a mythical existence, both immortals and demons fear.

91019.name: Harmony of Zither and Se
91019.description: A red-sleeved companion adds fragrance, Dao couple deep in love, on the path of ascension no one is missing.

91020.name: Qi Refining Emergence
91020.description: A wisp of spiritual energy enters the body, mortal fetus begins to shed mortal dust.

91021.name: Foundation Establishment Quest for Immortality
91021.description: Foundation built in the dantian, the path to immortality begins from here.

91022.name: Golden Core Dao Seed
91022.description: Dragon and tiger converge, golden core initially formed, lifespan doubled.

91023.name: Nascent Soul Transformation
91023.description: Purple mansion nascent soul exits, soars through heaven and earth, magical powers self-formed.

91024.name: Transcending Soul Tribulation
91024.description: Three calamities and nine tribulations passed, primordial spirit indestructible, half-step to immortal rank.

91025.name: Millennium Immortal Longevity
91025.description: Lifespan exceeds five hundred years, the mortal world has already cycled through several reincarnations.

91026.name: Heavenly Thunder Tempered Body
91026.description: Thunder tribulation strikes but not extinguished, physical body transformed into a precious raft.

91027.name: Love Tribulation Questioning Love
91027.description: Gain one person's heart, cultivate together until white hair, deep bond of Dao companions.

91028.name: Immortal Second Generation
91028.description: Born into an immortal cultivation family, immortal resources and spiritual materials never lacking since childhood.

91029.name: Carefree Immortal Path
91029.description: No attachments, heart state complete, laughing proudly in the nine heavens.

91030.name: First Glimpse of the Path
91030.description: Lead qi into the body, dantian first warms, henceforth step onto the immortal path. The road ahead is long, the Dao heart just awakened.

91031.name: Foundation Establishment Achieved
91031.description: Hundred-day foundation establishment, reborn with new bones, mortal frame gradually transforms into immortal bones. Controlling artifacts and soaring in the void, only then know the vastness of heaven and earth.

91032.name: Golden Core True Person
91032.description: Swallow a golden core into the belly, then know that my destiny is not controlled by heaven. Lifespan over hundreds, the title of True Person already obtained.

91033.name: Nascent Soul Loose Immortal
91033.description: Shatter the core to form an infant, spirit roams the void, second primordial spirit exits. All cultivators under heaven bow their heads and submit.

91034.name: Transcending Soul Patriarch
91034.description: Spirit merges with heaven and earth, all mortal causality severed. A wave of the hand, mountains and rivers tremble, the great Dao is already near.

91035.name: Beauty and Bones
91035.description: Peerless appearance stirs up tribulation waves, Dao companion turns hostile, love debt entangles. Once autumn wind rises, rosy beauty turns to white bones.

91036.name: Millennium Turtle
91036.description: No matter how brilliant and talented you are, you can't match me surviving for a thousand years. Lifespan long, laughing as peers turn into yellow earth.

91037.name: Nine Deaths Unrepentant
91037.description: Meridians shattered inch by inch, Dao foundation about to be destroyed, yet repeatedly crawl out from mountains of corpses and seas of blood. Fate this tough, even heaven fears three parts.

91038.name: Money Can Reach the Gods
91038.description: Spirit stones like mountains, magical treasures like forests. Although not yet ascended in this life, already the wealthiest in the land, even the heavenly tribulation thunder can be paid for someone else to endure.

91039.name: Child of Fortune
91039.description: Heaven sends auspicious colors, earth gushes golden lotuses, opportunities never cease, as if the favorite child of heaven. Others beg bitterly but cannot obtain, yet you get them as easily as reaching out.

91040.name: First Step on Immortal Path
91040.description: Cast off mortal bones, step onto the immortal path, foundation established.

91041.name: Nine Cycles of Golden Elixir
91041.description: Swallow one golden elixir, and know that fate is not controlled by heaven.

91042.name: Nascent Soul Embryo
91042.description: Nascent Soul sits in the Purple Mansion, lifespan exceeds a thousand years.

91043.name: Shattering the Void
91043.description: Spirit roams the Great Void, physical body attains sainthood, a single thought breaks through realms.

91044.name: Millennium Longevity Immortal
91044.description: Enduring a thousand years of storms, mortal world cycles repeatedly, only immortal path is eternal.

91045.name: Physical Body Attaining Sainthood
91045.description: Without relying on treasures, the physical body crosses tribulation lightning, immortal through the ages.

91046.name: Exhausting Heavenly Secrets
91046.description: Deduce heavenly secrets, array path reaches divine level, all things within grasp.

91047.name: Wealth Can Reach the Gods
91047.description: Ten sides of immortal stones, spirit veins as home, richest in the thirty-six caves and seventy-two blessed lands.

91048.name: Laughing Away the Mortal World
91048.description: Seek not immortality, but joy; a hundred years of red dust vanish in one laugh.

91049.name: Mandate of Heaven
91049.description: Fortune favors, countless immortal encounters, nine myths appear, reaching the summit.

91050.name: Qi Refining Begins
91050.description: Draw heaven and earth qi into body, step into Qi Refining stage, path begins here.

91051.name: Foundation Establishment
91051.description: Condense liquid into foundation, dao platform first erected, cultivation foundation solidified.

91052.name: Golden Elixir Great Achievement
91052.description: Dragon and tiger merge, golden elixir forms within, divine powers arise, lifespan greatly increases.

91053.name: Nascent Soul Proving Dao
91053.description: Shatter elixir to form infant, primordial spirit appears, able to roam outside body, heaven and earth boundless.

91054.name: Spirit Transformation True Immortal
91054.description: Primordial spirit transforms into spirit, comprehending heavenly dao, only one step from ascension, revered by all.

91055.name: Lifespan Equal to Heaven
91055.description: Cultivating immortality for two hundred years, years like a song, dao heart imperishable.

91056.name: Defying Heaven to Change Fate
91056.description: All say fate is hard to defy, yet you have written a myth.

91057.name: Favor of Heaven
91057.description: Three myths appear, even heavenly dao glances at you.

91058.name: Banished Immortal's Countenance
91058.description: Peerless beauty, immortal grace and jade bones, not like one of the mundane world.

91059.name: Vast Immortal Wealth
91059.description: Spirit stones piled like mountains, wealth rivaling a sect.

91060.name: First Glimpse of Immortal Path
91060.description: Spiritual Root awakens, a wisp of Qi enters the body, finally stepping onto the Qi Refining stage.

91061.name: Foundation Establishment Achieved
91061.description: Foundation built in Dantian, shedding mortal bones, lifespan suddenly increases by a hundred years.

91062.name: Golden Core Great Way
91062.description: Dragon and tiger converge, one golden core swallowed into the abdomen, realizing that one's fate is not controlled by heaven.

91063.name: Nascent Soul Emerges
91063.description: Nascent Soul sits in the Purple Mansion, spirit roams beyond the Tai Xu, all phenomena of heaven and earth are captured in sight.

91064.name: Divine Transformation Ascension
91064.description: Primordial Spirit reaches great accomplishment, attracting heavenly tribulation, about to shatter the void and depart.

91065.name: Beloved Dao Companion
91065.description: Found a like-minded Dao companion, harmonious as lute and zither, together embarking on the path to immortality.

91066.name: Mystic Realm Serendipity
91066.description: Obtained heaven-defying fortune in a deadly mystic realm, even the laws of heaven and earth take notice.

91067.name: Nine Deaths Tribulation
91067.description: Survived nine deaths in the heavenly tribulation, yet the Dao heart becomes even clearer, like a divine weapon tempered by fire.

91068.name: Immortal Beauty
91068.description: Peerless countenance, bearing like a banished immortal descending to the mortal world, captivating all cultivators.

91069.name: Boundless Immortal Wealth
91069.description: Spirit stones piled into mountains, countless precious materials, laughing proudly in the cultivation world.

91070.name: First Step on the Path
91070.description: Draw heaven and earth's spiritual Qi into the body, shed mortal shell to become a cultivator, Qi Refining accomplished, entering the immortal path.

91071.name: Nascent Soul Emerges
91071.description: Shatter the golden core to form an infant, Primordial Spirit takes form, one more carefree wanderer between heaven and earth, one less person in the mundane world.

91072.name: Divine Transformation True Lord
91072.description: Primordial Spirit returns to emptiness, communicates with the great Dao, every move causes wind and clouds to change, this is Divine Transformation.

91073.name: Daytime Ascension
91073.description: Survive the ninefold heavenly thunder tribulation without perishing, attain true immortality, break through the realm and ascend, leaving a legend in the mortal world.

91074.name: Captivating Immortal Grace
91074.description: Jade bones and ice skin, heavenly beauty, even in the cultivation world she is unparalleled, her glances stir countless heart demons.

91075.name: Mystery Meditation and Dao Enlightenment
91075.description: Wisdom light penetrates through, thoroughly understands heavenly secrets, calculating all methods like observing palm lines, Dao heart's firmness rarely seen in the world.

91076.name: Surviving the Demon Calamity
91076.description: Several times heart demons devoured the soul, Dao heart nearly shattered, yet in desperation breaks down and rebuilds, instead attaining great enlightenment.

91077.name: Immortality and Eternal Life
91077.description: Lifespan exceeds a thousand years, witnessed seas change to mulberry fields, the immortal path is long, only you walk alone to this day.

91078.name: First Glimpse of the Path
91078.description: Draw Qi into the body, finally shed mortal shell, the immortal path begins from here.

91079.name: Dao Foundation Initially Established
91079.description: Foundation built over a hundred days, spiritual root stabilized, lifespan extended by a hundred years.

91080.name: Golden Elixir Ninefold
91080.description: Swallowing a golden elixir, one realizes that one's fate is not determined by heaven.

91081.name: Nascent Soul Breaks Cocoon
91081.description: Shattering the elixir to form the Nascent Soul, the spirit roams the void, sharing the lifespan of heaven and earth is no empty talk.

91082.name: Divine Transformation Ascends to Immortal
91082.description: The primordial spirit unites with the Dao, surviving tribulations without perishing, becoming the first immortal above the nine heavens.

91083.name: Spirit Stones in Abundance
91083.description: Spirit stones are like mountains in the storage pouch, cultivation resources are worry-free.

91084.name: Immortal Couple Bond
91084.description: Meeting a Dao companion, the zither and se blend in harmony, the immortal path is not lonely.

91085.name: Crossing Tribulation to Prove the Dao
91085.description: The lightning tribulation tempers the body, surviving through a hundred deaths, finally earning the recognition of heaven's Dao.

91086.name: Two Hundred Springs and Autumns
91086.description: Cultivating the Dao for two hundred years, witnessing the vicissitudes of the mortal world.

91087.name: Immortal Visage Everlasting
91087.description: Skin like congealed fat, face like jade, a hundred years without signs of aging.

91088.name: First Glimpse of the Immortal Path
91088.description: Drawing qi into the body, one realizes the vastness of heaven and earth, and thus steps onto the path of defying heaven.

91089.name: Foundation Establishment Accomplished
91089.description: Building the Dao foundation in the dantian, the immortal path begins to appear, lifespan already beyond the ordinary.

91090.name: Golden Elixir True Person
91090.description: Dragon and tiger intertwine, swallowing a golden elixir, one knows that fate is in one's own hands, not heaven's.

91091.name: Nascent Soul Ancestor
91091.description: Shattering the elixir to form the Nascent Soul, the primordial spirit is initially formed, with a lift of the hand one can move mountains and seas.

91092.name: Divine Transformation Heavenly Venerable
91092.description: The primordial spirit unites with the Dao, the Dharma form fills the heavens, in a single thought, the starry river turns upside down.

91093.name: Century-Old Body
91093.description: A hundred years in the mortal world, countenance unchanged, people respectfully call you 'Old Immortal'.

91094.name: Millennium Legend
91094.description: Rewriting fate three times, the legends spread among the marketplaces are all roads you have walked.

91095.name: Unmatched Immortal Grace
91095.description: A smile turning back makes mountains and rivers lose color; even the celestial maidens of the nine heavens are no more than this.

91096.name: Boundless Wealth
91096.description: Spirit stones pave the ground, magical treasures fill the warehouse, cultivation resources are inexhaustible.

91097.name: Carefree in the World
91097.description: With no attachments in the heart, riding a sword on the clouds, roaming freely between heaven and earth.

91098.name: First Entry into the Immortal Gate
91098.description: Feeling qi entering the body, stepping onto the path of Qi Refinement, immortals and mortals part ways from then on.

91099.name: Foundation Establishment Accomplished
91099.description: Building the Dao foundation in the dantian, lifespan extends to one hundred fifty, the Dao path is henceforth stable.

91100.name: Golden Core Path
91100.description: Dragon and tiger converge, golden core solidifies, one can be called a true person, sword flying for a thousand miles.

91101.name: Nascent Soul Emergence
91101.description: Core shatters into infant, soul indestructible, moving mountains and overturning seas, awe-inspiring one region.

91102.name: Daytime Ascension
91102.description: Surviving heavenly tribulation, ascending in rosy clouds, entering the ranks of immortals, as long-lived as heaven.

91103.name: A Millennium of Cultivation
91103.description: Cultivating for a thousand years, witnessing all mortal vicissitudes, only then realizing the loneliness of immortality.

91104.name: Banned Immortal Appearance
91104.description: Unearthly beauty, looks like an immortal, even the cultivation world is captivated.

91105.name: No Flaw in Calculation
91105.description: Mind nearly demonic, deducing heavenly secrets, all things within grasp.

91106.name: Indestructible Immortal Body
91106.description: Body becomes saint, diamond indestructible, enduring myriad tribulations without decay.

91107.name: Destiny Ordained
91107.description: Repeatedly encountering miraculous opportunities, fortune favoring, as if a child of heaven's way.

91108.name: First Step into Immortal Path
91108.description: A wisp of spiritual energy enters the body, officially departing the mortal world, henceforth mountains high and waters long, immortal path distant.

91109.name: Feathered Ascension to Immortality
91109.description: Nine tribulations passed, heavenly gate opens, ascending in daytime, thus leaping out of the three realms, not within the five elements.

91110.name: A Millennial Dream
91110.description: Cultivation knows not years, look back and a thousand years have passed, old friends withered, only the Dao remains eternal.

91111.name: Unfathomable Heavenly Secrets
91111.description: Root of wisdom deeply planted, deducing heavenly secrets like reading palm lines, a rare cultivation genius among ten thousand.

91112.name: Spirit Stones Like Rain
91112.description: Owning immortal crystal veins, spirit stones piled like mountains, all world's wealth enters the pocket, why worry about resources in cultivation.

91113.name: Immortal Grace and Beauty
91113.description: Looks like a celestial, one glance topples a city, second glance topples a nation, even the cultivation world turns heads for the countenance.

91114.name: Dao Heart Clear and Bright
91114.description: Enduring myriad tribulations without falling from original heart, dao heart clear as crystal, ten thousand dharmas cannot invade, truly an immortal seed.

91115.name: Nine Cycles of Reincarnation
91115.description: Repeatedly reincarnating and rebuilding cultivation, comprehending dao between life and death, ninth life finally glimpses the gate of great dao.

91116.name: Myth Eternal
91116.description: Repeatedly creating legendary tales, name recorded in immortal history, future generations look up, already a figure of myth.

91117.name: First Sense of Qi
91117.description: First time drawing qi into the body, immortal path begins, mortal world gradually fades.

91118.name: Foundation Established
91118.description: Through a hundred days of arduous cultivation, lays immortal foundation, henceforth transcends the mundane.

91119.name: Golden Core Barrier Broken
91119.description: Elixir completed nine cycles, shattered mortal body, lifespan surged by three hundred years.

91120.name: Nascent Soul's First Cry
91120.description: The dantian nurtures an infant, as if reborn; the Nascent Soul exits the body and roams a thousand miles.

91121.name: Divine Transformation and Return to Void
91121.description: The spirit merges with the Dao, returning to simplicity; soon to ascend.

91122.name: Old but Not Dead
91122.description: Lived over three hundred years, witnessing the rise and fall of several dynasties.

91123.name: Enduring Three Calamities
91123.description: Struck by three heavenly tribulations, died and revived; even heaven cannot take him.

91124.name: Only Envy the Mandarin Ducks
91124.description: Found a perfect match, harmonious like lute and zither; the immortal path is not walked alone.

91125.name: Myriad Strings of Immortal Wealth
91125.description: Amassed spirit stones like mountains; any secret treasure in the world can be taken.

91126.name: Three Flowers Crowned at the Summit
91126.description: Peerless in talent, appearance, and physique; no contemporary surpasses him.

91127.name: First Step on the Immortal Path
91127.description: Refined Qi into the body, spirit root awakened; henceforth a stranger to the mortal world.

91128.name: Foundation Establishment Achieved
91128.description: Dantian like a cauldron, the foundation of the Dao initially solidified; the immortal path henceforth has fewer calamities.

91129.name: Golden Core True Person
91129.description: Swallowed a golden core into the belly; only then knew my fate is not controlled by heaven.

91130.name: Nascent Soul Patriarch
91130.description: A red infant sits in the Purple Mansion; supernatural powers arise naturally; a lifespan of a thousand years is foreseeable.

91131.name: Divine Transformation Heavenly Venerable
91131.description: The primordial spirit transforms into myriad; with a thought, mountains and rivers change color; only one step away from breaking the void.

91132.name: Longevity Comparable to Immortal Peaks
91132.description: Three hundred springs and autumns pass in a snap; green mountains remain, this body not aged.

91133.name: Deep Immortal Affinity
91133.description: Entered secret realms three times and obtained fortune; a frequent visitor to immortal caves.

91134.name: Red Beauty Like Snow
91134.description: Jade bone and ice skin, peerless beauty; even immortals would turn their heads.

91135.name: Master of the Spirit Mountain
91135.description: Spirit stones like a mountain range; wealth rivaling a sect.

91136.name: Passerby of Reincarnation
91136.description: In a hundred reincarnations, you have seen different fireworks, yet still walk on this immortal path.
